div1.entryFree:
Sergeant, 1) a sheriff's officer, a bailiff: if any hour meet a s., a' turns back for very fear, Err. IV, 2, 56. Err. IV, 2, 56 the s. of the band, he that brings any man to answer it that breaks his band, IV, 3, 30. IV, 3, 30 your office, s. H8 I, 1, 198. this fell s. death is strict in his arrest, Hml. V, 2, 347.
2) a non-commissioned officer in the army: H6A II, 1, 5. Mcb. I, 2, 3.
